title: The Breathtaking Dunes of the Namib Desert

scenes.text: This dune is one of the tallest in the world, radiating vibrant colors.
This is Dune 45, located in the Namib Desert, Namibia.
Dune 45 is made of ancient sand, over five million years old.
And its vibrant hues change with the sunlight.
scenes.label: SUNLIGHT PLAY

scenes.text: Follow for the planet's best-kept secrets.

description: 📍 Dune 45, Namib Desert - Namibia. A spectacular dune known for its age and mesmerizing colors that shift with the sun. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌵
